hero.description: Software Engineer specializing in building robust, multi-tenant cloud backends and deploying the secure developer infrastructure needed to safely scale autonomous AI workflows.

originStory.title: The Next Paradigm of Systems Engineering
originStory.content: Software architecture is shifting from rigid cloud infrastructure to cognitive ecosystems. I design platforms that don't just host code, but seamlessly govern, scale, and collaborate with autonomous AI agents.

experience.description: Engineered secure Python and FastAPI multi-tenant SaaS backends integrated with AI-native core workflows, architecting the foundational cloud harnesses required to transition traditional development pipelines into self-healing, autonomous engineering ecosystems.

Led an agile team of developers in refactoring legacy banking monoliths into containerized Java Spring Boot microservices. Oversaw cloud-native migration and sprint planning to optimize distributed backend performance and eliminate downtime.

education.degree: Master of Engineering in Electrical and Computer Engineering

education.institution: Rutgers, The State University of New Jersey
education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Management Information System

interests.title: Invention
interests.subtitle: Flexible Portable Yogurt Fermentation Device
interests.description: Patented a flexible portable yogurt fermentation device (CN201721005435.0). Applying engineering problem-solving to everyday challenges with practical innovations.

sideProjects.title: Cloud Native Resume
sideProjects.description: A highly available, serverless portfolio architecture. Utilizes S3 for static hosting, CloudFront for CDN, API Gateway, and DynamoDB for visitor analytics.

sideProjects.title: Spy Fall Arena
sideProjects.description: Multi-agent LLM environment playing the social deduction game 'Spyfall'. Evaluates reasoning, deception, and deduction capabilities across different models.
